blocks.text: Match preview: Hungary face Austria in 2nd T20I (T20) on Sun, 28 Jun, 2026, 12:30 pm at GB Oval Szodliget. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Overcast · High 41°C / Low 25°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 15 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
